title: Supporting Veteran Families in Need Act
short_title: Supporting Veteran Families in Need Act
stage_label: Referred to the Subcommittee on Economic Opportunity.
crs_summary: Supporting Veteran Families in Need Act This bill permanently extends authorization for the Supportive Services for Veteran Families program of the Department of Veterans Affairs, which provides supportive services to very low-income veterans (and their families) occupying or transitioning to permanent housing.
last_action_text: Referred to the Subcommittee on Economic Opportunity.
